pageTitle: cyMaking an offer to pay your arrears
heading: cyMaking an offer to pay your arrears
paragraph1: cyFrom your previous answers, you have not come to any arrangement with {{claimantName}} to pay off your rent arrears.
paragraph2: cyYou can offer to pay off your arrears in instalments and say how much you’d be able to afford to pay and how frequently.
paragraph3: cyAt the hearing, the judge will look at your offer and the details of your income and expenses you choose to share. They will decide if your offer is affordable.
paragraph4: cyYou’ll be able to tell the judge if the amount you can afford to pay has changed.
question: cyWould you like to offer to pay your arrears in instalments?

errors.confirmInstallmentOffer: cySelect whether you would like to offer to pay your arrears in instalments
